name: creator_strategy
description: Use for creator growth plans, release strategies, monetization playbooks, audience development, platform positioning, and business decision support.

name: brand_voice
description: Use for brand messaging, bios, artist narratives, campaign copy, social hooks, website copy, and creator positioning language.

name: ops_automation
description: Use for backend architecture, workflow design, automation planning, admin operations, dashboards, permissions, and system implementation.

name: funding_intelligence
description: Use for creator investment readiness, offer packaging, sponsor strategy, platform pricing, financial modeling, and monetization scenarios.

name: casual_conversation
description: Use for general chat, lightweight questions, brainstorming, and requests that do not need specialized routing.
